name: python3-talloc
title: python3-talloc
summary: hierarchical pool based memory allocator - Python3 bindings
description:
hierarchical pool based memory allocator - Python3 bindings
A hierarchical pool based memory allocator with destructors. It uses
reference counting to determine when memory should be freed.
.
This package contains the Python 3 bindings.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-talloc because hierarchical pool based memory allocator - Python3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-talloc as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-talloc with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-talloc --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
